data.body: ROOT CAUSE (confirmed): _no_repo_root_leaks snapshotted only top-level names via set(os.listdir(REPO_ROOT)), so a write INTO a pre-existing dir (.rebar/) added no new top-level entry and slipped past locally; CI's porcelain backstop also excludes gitignored .rebar/ — a double blind spot. FIX (branch worktree-civil-marlin-flare, commit 91b69940): extracted _isolation.repo_leak_snapshot which also watches LEAK_WATCH_SUBDIRS=('.rebar',) one level deep; deepest-first cleanup; primitive + end-to-end pytester self-tests. Full suite (3290 passed) confirms no false positives. Pending PR/merge before close.
